source_pr.title: planner: fix the ORDER BY column not match the GROUP BY clause
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #24676 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: fix the `ORDER BY` column not match the `GROUP BY` clause

How it Works:

### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- no release note.
